ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: Miru uses your camera to take profile photos and record videos to share with your matches.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Miru needs access to your photo library so you can choose photos and videos for your profile and posts.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Miru saves photos to your library when you download shared media from your matches.
ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Miru uses your microphone to record video messages and profile videos.
